comments.MD041: Disable this rule to allow first line headings
comments.no-duplicate-heading: Disable this rule to allow duplicate headings
comments.MD013: Set line length to 80 characters, but ignore code blocks and tables
comments.MD022: Ensure headers are surrounded by blank lines
comments.custom_rules: Enforce specific heading style and require certain elements
comments.ignore: Ignore specific directories that do not need to be linted
